question: The scatter plot shows daily screen time vs. sleep hours. Which statement best describes the relationship between screen time and sleep according to the chart data?

options.A: People who spend the most time on screens generally get the most sleep.
options.B: Sleep hours tend to decrease as daily screen time increases.
options.C: There is no clear relationship between screen time and sleep.
options.D: Sleep hours remain roughly constant regardless of screen time.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
